name: Maas Group Holdings Limited
analysis: MGH has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$5.2103. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$5.2678 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$5.2103, stop A$4.8114, target A$5.2700. Risk/reward is 0.15:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
